_comment: Copy this file to dm_config.json and fill in your settings. dm_config.json is gitignored.

ollama.description: Free, runs locally. Requires Ollama installed and running (ollama serve).
setup: 1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.com  (or: winget install Ollama.Ollama)
2. Pull a model:   ollama pull hermes-3:8b-llama3.1-q6_K
3. Set backend to 'ollama' and model to 'hermes-3:8b-llama3.1-q6_K' (or whichever you pulled)
